A Simple Approach to Payroll, HR, and Benefits

Hire, pay, manage, and retain employees with confidence.

Time-Saving, Scalable HR Solutions

Compliance Support

Award-Winning 24/7 Assistance

One Platform For HR and Payroll

Payroll Services

Pay your people in just a few clicks through an easy-to-use online payroll software with flexible processing and automated tax administration.

Human Resources

The combination of proactive HR advice to help you focus on your business and an all-in-one HR technology to simplify employee engagement.

Time & Attendance

Save time, prevent errors and connect employees with information they need across devices, locations, and services.

Employee Benefits

Increase recruitment and retention by offering cost-effective, comprehensive employee health, financial, and retirement packages.

Hear From Some of Our Customers

Our clients say Paychex1:

  • Improved the accuracy of their payroll
  • Increased their ability to maintain HR compliance
  • Increased their overall productivity

"The daily time that I don’t spend on (payroll) … it really changes my daily routine. It allows me to make phone calls, answer emails, talk with general contractors and talk with my franchise (personnel). Having the ability to do that streamlines both processes."

Tommy Stuckey

Sub Shop Franchisee

Sub Shop Franchisee Tommy Stuckey
